overall.description: A cinematic game engine video depicting a sunset walk along a coastal pier. The camera moves steadily forward along the wooden deck toward a twin-building complex at the pier's end, passes through the covered breezeway, and continues along the side deck revealing the coastal hillside and shoreline buildings as day transitions to evening.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide wooden pier deck at sunset, with wet planks reflecting pink and orange hues. The camera moves forward past green benches and white railings with spherical lights, approaching a distinctive twin-building complex at the pier's terminus while the ocean stretches out on both sides.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow covered passage between the two pier buildings, passing through wooden gates. The space becomes enclosed with building walls on both sides, featuring a cafe sign on the left structure, while the overhead bridge blocks the sky view.

events.description: exiting the covered building to open ocean view at the pier's end
turning right to walk along the side deck

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered passage, the scene opens to a wide ocean overlook at the pier's terminus, with unobstructed views of the sunset horizon. The camera then turns right, transitioning from facing the ocean to following the side deck along the building's exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: side deck with coastal hillside and shoreline buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the side deck with the coastal hillside and illuminated buildings visible to the left

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the side deck along the building's exterior, revealing a coastal hillside with scattered trees and illuminated shoreline buildings to the left. The deck is partially covered by the building overhang as the camera continues forward, with the ocean now visible only to the right beyond the railings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a coastal pier that transitions from an open sunset vista into an enclosed architectural passage before revealing a panoramic hillside view. It begins on a wide wooden deck where wet planks reflect pink and orange hues, moving past green benches and white railings toward a twin-building complex. As the camera reaches the terminus, the scene shifts from the open ocean into a narrow covered passage, passing through wooden gates and beneath an overhead bridge. The view then expands abruptly upon emerging from the passage into a wide ocean overlook, before the camera turns right to follow the building's exterior along a side deck. Finally, the perspective shifts toward the land, revealing a coastal hillside with scattered trees and illuminated shoreline buildings as the ocean recedes to the right.
